items.title: AMD engineer 3D-prints Steam Machine-a-like with diagonal mobo mounting — parts include a Mini ITX motherboard, RTX 5060, and a flex ATX PSU
items.description: The Terk Box v1.1 looks like the closest DIY alternative to Valve's Steam Machine yet. 3D print source files are available.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 1 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter With widespread disappointment regarding the availability and pricing of Valve’s Steam Machine, influencers and creators have been mixing up ‘alternatives’ of various shapes and sizes. However, we think the Terk Box v1.1 looks like the closest alternative yet in design and spirit. The work, as spotted by Hackaday, appears to be a collaboration between Jacob Terkelsen, an ex-Tom's Hardware contributor currently working for AMD, and a 3D printing and SFF PCs enthusiast who goes by the handle of 3DCatt.Here she is, Terk Box v1. 1I'm working with the designer about future improvements, but for a first major revision and she's now "complete"We added more ventilation in the back so the RTX 5060 is no longer choked.HMU if you want me to build you one. pic.twitter.com/PAt0WaBXGXJune 24, 2026If you are a 3D printer owner, you can grab the source files for the Terk Box v1.1 direct from Printables.com. There you will find a parts list, which details the various screws, riser cables, and numerous other parts you will need. The .STL source files are all there, too, of course, under a Creative Commons license.Specific component brands don’t seem to be suggested by the makers, which is probably due to the set of standards embraced by the various PC parts makers. However, we do note in the user comments some people may have had a hard time fitting their GPU. 3DCatt says the max length that will fit is “about 180mm long.” That isn’t all, though, as the recommended PCIe riser cable wasn’t long enough for some, depending on the GPU model. AMD’s Terkelsen chipped in that the build was suitable for his RTX 5060 LP graphics card, but he requested more room for a front 140mm case fan, among a few other tweaks.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: The current revision of the Terk Box measures 167 x 168 x 225mm. That may be close enough to the official machine (152 x 162 x 156mm) to justify the extra effort of doing this instead of finding an off-the-peg compact Mini ITX case. Some of the compromises with the Terk Box v1.1 appear to be the fussiness with GPU choice we mentioned above, and the less-than-ideal positioning of the CPU socket in relation to the PSU. However, both 3DCatt and Terkelsen have hinted at refinements on the way to v1.2.Since they have already strayed from the cubic confines of Valve’s actual Steam Machine, I feel they shouldn’t feel too shackled to the design they currently have. I’ll be watching further developments with interest. You may like Enthusiast builds 3D-printed retro PC case and shares the files so you can print it yourself Valve engineers talk Steam Machine, pricing, and the benefits of massive heatsinks Valve Steam Machine review: Couch gaming unboxed, but not always at 4K In summary, this is a design much closer in stature and spirit to the original Valve effort, but it is definitely a work in progress. With the various component constraints, the DIY price for this won’t be the most compelling, either. Readers who are 3D printing and PC DIY aficionados, and we must have a few of those, might be able to contribute to the project with suggestions, tweaks, and remixes. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
items.author: Mark Tyson
items.titleZh: AMD工程师3D打印类似Steam Machine的设备，采用对角线主板安装——部件包括Mini ITX主板、RTX 5060和Flex ATX电源
items.descriptionZh:
由于Valve官方推出的Steam Machine在供货和定价上未能满足玩家期待，不少创作者和KOL开始探索各种形态的替代方案。其中，由前Tom's Hardware撰稿人、现任AMD员工Jacob Terkelsen与3D打印及小尺寸PC（SFF）爱好者3DCatt联手打造的Terk Box v1.1，被认为在设计和精神上最接近Valve原版Steam Machine。

该机箱完全通过3D打印制造，设计图纸及零件清单已开源至Printables.com平台，采用Creative Commons许可协议，用户可免费下载.STL源文件自行打印。核心创新在于将紧凑的迷你ITX主板、独立显卡和电源模组整合进仅约167×168×225mm的立体空间内——相比Valve官方Steam Machine的152×162×156mm尺寸，Terk Box在体积上略有增加，但依然保持了极高的紧凑性。设计者并未指定特定品牌部件，而是遵循PC组件通用标准，因此用户可根据需求自由搭配CPU、内存和存储。

性能方面，Terk Box v1.1专为标准Mini ITX主板和独立显卡设计，Jacob本人使用了一块RTX 5060 LP（低轮廓）显卡进行验证。但项目存在几个关键限制：GPU最大长度约180mm，部分用户反馈推荐的PCIe延长线（riser cable）长度不足，导致较长的显卡安装困难；此外，CPU插槽与电源的布局也存在优化空间。为改善散热，v1.1版本已在背部增加了更多通风孔，以解决原版RTX 5060进气受阻的问题。对比而言，虽然尺寸比官方机器大一圈，但免去了寻找现成紧凑机箱的折腾，且完全可定制。

技术上，该项目展示了如何通过3D打印突破传统机箱的形态限制，将Valve的“客厅游戏PC”理念落地为可复制的DIY方案。其影响主要在于为3D打印和PC DIY爱好者提供了一个高度可修改的开源平台——用户可根据自身显卡、风扇和散热器规格调整内部结构。目前设计者已透露v1.2版本会进一步优化GPU兼容性和内部布局（例如增加前置140mm风扇位）。不过，由于组件限制和打印成本，DIY总价未必比直接购买成品机箱更具性价比，更适合追求个性化定制的进阶玩家。如果你是一名3D打印和PC改装爱好者，可以将自己的改进方案反馈给项目作者，甚至进行二次创作（remix）。

items.title: China’s Loongson launches homegrown 16-core server CPU built on LoongArch architecture — 40W chip with DDR4 ECC and 32 PCIe lanes targets cheap SMB file, database, and web servers
items.description: Loongson has announced the 3C3000, a 16-core LoongArch server CPU with DDR4 ECC, 32 PCIe lanes, 40W typical power, and performance claimed to match the earlier 3C5000.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Loongson Technology has announced the Loongson 3C3000, a new 16-core server processor aimed at low-cost general-purpose server systems. Unveiled on June 26, 2026, via a public corporate release, the chip is based on Loongson’s in-house architecture and is designed for small- and medium-sized business workloads, including file, database, web, and business process servers. Loongson says the 3C3000’s general-purpose computing performance matches that of the company’s earlier 3C5000 server processor.The Loongson 3C3000 — which is based on a 64-bit architecture and supports the LoongArch instruction set — uses the company’s LA364E processor core design and comes in an FCBGA1371 package measuring 37.5mm by 37.5mm. The chip is pin-compatible with the Loongson 3B6000 processor, which should make it easier for system builders to reuse existing platform designs.The processor features 16 physical cores and 16 threads, with clock speeds ranging from 1.5 GHz to 1.8 GHz. Each core supports 128-bit vector instructions and three-issue out-of-order execution. Loongson says each core integrates two fixed-point units, one vector unit, and two memory access units.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: Cache and memory support are modest by modern server standards, but in line with the chip’s low-cost positioning. Each core includes 64KB of private L1 instruction cache and 64KB of private L1 data cache, while all 16 cores share 16MB of L2 cache. The integrated memory controller supports two 72-bit DDR4-2400 memory channels with ECC support, giving the processor server-class error correction for business and infrastructure workloads.For expansion, the 3C3000 provides two PCIe x16 interfaces, totaling 32 PCIe lanes. These can be split into up to four x4 or x8 interfaces, depending on platform requirements. The chip also includes another PCIe x16 interface that can be configured as LCL (Loongson Coherent Link) for dual-processor interconnection. Other interfaces include SPI, UART, three I2C interfaces, AVS, and 16 GPIOs. You may like China's next-gen CPUs and GPUs prepare to challenge Intel Alder Lake and AMD RX 550 in 2027 Intel's 5.7 GHz Xeon 6377P features 12 P-cores and a desktop-class LGA1700 socket Arm to sell its new AGI CPU in China Loongson lists a typical power consumption of 40W when running at 1.5 GHz. The processor supports dynamic shutdown of the main module clock and dynamic frequency adjustment of the main clock domain, helping reduce power consumption under lighter workloads. It also integrates a Loongson-developed security and trust module that supports Chinese national cryptographic algorithms for encryption and decryption.Unlike the 36C000, which Loongson says matches Intel’s Xeon, the company is positioning the 3C3000 as a low-cost, high-performance server CPU for customers that need general-purpose compute rather than high-end acceleration or AI performance, slotting it below the higher-core-count 3C6000 server lineup the company launched a year earlier. Support for China’s local software and hardware ecosystem also appears to be a selling point. The company has not publicly disclosed pricing, a common move for server processors, which are often sold through system builders and negotiated enterprise deals rather than as boxed retail chips.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsFollow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
items.author: Etiido Uko
items.titleZh: 中国龙芯发布基于龙架构的自主研发16核服务器CPU——40W功耗、支持DDR4 ECC和32条PCIe通道，瞄准廉价中小企业文件、数据库和网络服务器
items.descriptionZh:
龙芯科技于2026年6月26日通过官方公告正式发布了龙芯3C3000处理器，这是一款面向低成本通用服务器系统的16核服务器芯片。该芯片基于龙芯自主架构设计，主要瞄准中小企业的工作负载场景，包括文件服务器、数据库服务器、Web服务器以及业务处理服务器。龙芯表示，3C3000的通用计算性能与公司此前推出的3C5000服务器处理器相当。

在核心技术方面，龙芯3C3000采用64位架构，支持龙芯自主指令集LoongArch，并使用公司自主研发的LA364E处理器核心设计。该芯片封装在37.5mm×37.5mm的FCBGA1371封装中，并且与龙芯3B6000处理器引脚兼容，这使得系统制造商能够轻松复用现有的平台设计，降低开发成本。

性能参数上，3C3000拥有16个物理核心和16线程，主频范围为1.5GHz至1.8GHz。每个核心支持128位向量指令和三发射乱序执行架构。龙芯透露，每个核心集成了两个定点单元、一个向量单元和两个内存访问单元。缓存和内存支持方面，每个核心拥有64KB私有L1指令缓存和64KB私有L1数据缓存，所有16个核心共享16MB的L2缓存。内置内存控制器支持两个72位DDR4-2400内存通道，并支持ECC纠错，为企业和基础设施工作负载提供服务器级别的错误修正能力。扩展接口方面，3C3000提供两个PCIe x16接口，共32条PCIe通道，可根据平台需求拆分为最多4个x4或x8接口。芯片还包含另一个可配置为龙芯一致性链路（LCL）的PCIe x16接口，用于双处理器互联。其他接口包括SPI、UART、三个I2C接口、AVS和16个GPIO。

功耗方面，龙芯列出了在1.5GHz运行时的典型功耗为40W。处理器支持主模块时钟的动态关闭以及主时钟域的动态频率调整，有助于在轻负载下降低功耗。它还集成了龙芯开发的安全与可信模块，支持中国国家密码算法进行加密和解密。

与龙芯此前宣称对标英特尔至强的36C000不同，3C3000被定位为一款低成本、高性能的服务器CPU，面向需要通用计算而非高端加速或AI性能的客户，其定位低于一年前发布的高核心数3C6000服务器系列。对中国本地软硬件生态系统的支持也被视为一个卖点。龙芯尚未公开披露定价，这是服务器处理器的常见做法——通常通过系统集成商和谈判的企业交易销售，而非作为零售盒装芯片出售。

history.titleZh: 中国龙芯发布基于龙架构的自主研发16核服务器CPU——40W功耗、支持DDR4 ECC和32条PCIe通道，瞄准廉价中小企业文件、数据库和网络服务器

龙芯科技于2026年6月26日通过官方公告正式发布了龙芯3C3000处理器，这是一款面向低成本通用服务器系统的16核服务器芯片。该芯片基于龙芯自主架构设计，主要瞄准中小企业的工作负载场景，包括文件服务器、数据库服务器、Web服务器以及业务处理服务器。龙芯表示，3C3000的通用计算性能与公司此前推出的3C5000服务器处理器相当。

在核心技术方面，龙芯3C3000采用64位架构，支持龙芯自主指令集LoongArch，并使用公司自主研发的LA364E处理器核心设计。该芯片封装在37.5mm×37.5mm的FCBGA1371封装中，并且与龙芯3B6000处理器引脚兼容，这使得系统制造商能够轻松复用现有的平台设计，降低开发成本。

性能参数上，3C3000拥有16个物理核心和16线程，主频范围为1.5GHz至1.8GHz。每个核心支持128位向量指令和三发射乱序执行架构。龙芯透露，每个核心集成了两个定点单元、一个向量单元和两个内存访问单元。缓存和内存支持方面，每个核心拥有64KB私有L1指令缓存和64KB私有L1数据缓存，所有16个核心共享16MB的L2缓存。内置内存控制器支持两个72位DDR4-2400内存通道，并支持ECC纠错，为企业和基础设施工作负载提供服务器级别的错误修正能力。扩展接口方面，3C3000提供两个PCIe x16接口，共32条PCIe通道，可根据平台需求拆分为最多4个x4或x8接口。芯片还包含另一个可配置为龙芯一致性链路（LCL）的PCIe x16接口，用于双处理器互联。其他接口包括SPI、UART、三个I2C接口、AVS和16个GPIO。

功耗方面，龙芯列出了在1.5GHz运行时的典型功耗为40W。处理器支持主模块时钟的动态关闭以及主时钟域的动态频率调整，有助于在轻负载下降低功耗。它还集成了龙芯开发的安全与可信模块，支持中国国家密码算法进行加密和解密。

与龙芯此前宣称对标英特尔至强的36C000不同，3C3000被定位为一款低成本、高性能的服务器CPU，面向需要通用计算而非高端加速或AI性能的客户，其定位低于一年前发布的高核心数3C6000服务器系列。对中国本地软硬件生态系统的支持也被视为一个卖点。龙芯尚未公开披露定价，这是服务器处理器的常见做法——通常通过系统集成商和谈判的企业交易销售，而非作为零售盒装芯片出售。
